description: Portfólio web multi-page criativo com animações pesadas, dark mode, e componentes shadcn. Stack: Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn (base-nova) + Motion + TypeScript.

userStories.title: Setup de dependências e configuração base
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to install dependencies and configure the project to support animations (Motion), blog (MDX), and dark/light theme.
acceptanceCriteria: motion is installed and working
@next/mdx, @mdx-js/loader, @mdx-js/react, @types/mdx installed
next.config.ts configured with MDX support (createMDX + pageExtensions)
mdx-components.tsx created at project root
@tailwindcss/typography installed for prose styles
next-themes installed for dark/light theme management
Folder structure created: components/layout/, components/creative/, components/sections/, data/, content/blog/
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Install shadcn components
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to install all shadcn components used in the portfolio for visual consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: shadcn components installed via CLI: card, badge, separator, sheet, navigation-menu, dialog, skeleton, tabs, toggle, avatar, tooltip, scroll-area, carousel, dropdown-menu
Hook use-mobile installed via shadcn
All components importable without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Dark/light theme system with shadcn
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to toggle between dark mode and light mode to browse in my preferred theme.
acceptanceCriteria: next-themes configured with ThemeProvider in root layout
Dark mode is the default (defaultTheme: 'dark')
Respects system preference as fallback
Toggle button in navbar using shadcn dropdown-menu with options: Light, Dark, System
Icon changes between Sun/Moon (lucide-react) based on active theme
Smooth transition between themes (CSS transition on background-color)
Theme persists via cookie/localStorage
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Responsive Navbar with animation
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to navigate between portfolio pages via an elegant menu that reacts to scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Sticky navbar at top using shadcn navigation-menu as base
Links: Home, Projetos, About
Logo/name 'Luan Campos K.' on the left
Theme toggle on the right (from US-003)
Backdrop-blur + shrink effect on scroll (CSS transition + scroll event)
On mobile: hamburger menu opens shadcn sheet (side drawer) with animated links (stagger with Motion)
Uses shadcn use-mobile hook for breakpoint detection
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Footer component
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see contact information and social links in the footer.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer with shadcn separator on top
Social links: GitHub, LinkedIn, Email (lucide-react icons)
Copyright with dynamic year
Responsive layout (vertical stack on mobile, horizontal on desktop)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Root layout with Navbar and Footer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to assemble the root layout wrapping all pages with Navbar and Footer.
acceptanceCriteria: layout.tsx updated with ThemeProvider, Navbar and Footer
scroll-behavior: smooth in globals.css
Content (children) fills space between Navbar and Footer (flex-grow)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Creative component — Gradient Blob
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see animated decorative blobs in the hero background for visual atmosphere.
acceptanceCriteria: Component gradient-blob.tsx in components/creative/
Blobs use CSS @keyframes (float/morph) — no JS for performance
Colors based on theme variables (oklch) — change with dark/light
position: absolute + pointer-events: none to not block interaction
Strong blur (blur-3xl) for soft glow effect
Accepts props: className, color, size, delay
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Creative component — Text Reveal
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see text appearing character by character or word by word on scroll — cinematic effect.
acceptanceCriteria: Component text-reveal.tsx in components/creative/
Uses Motion whileInView + stagger to animate each word/character
Props: text, className, delay, mode: 'words' | 'chars'
Respects prefers-reduced-motion (shows text directly without animation)
Animation uses opacity + translateY (GPU-composited)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Creative component — Cursor Spotlight
userStories.description: As a desktop visitor, I want to see a subtle light effect following my cursor on the dark background — premium feel.
acceptanceCriteria: Component cursor-spotlight.tsx in components/creative/
Radial gradient follows mouse position via CSS custom properties
Uses mousemove event listener on container
Disabled on mobile (no mouse)
pointer-events: none to not block clicks
Loaded with next/dynamic({ ssr: false }) to avoid hydration cost
Subtle — must not distract from content
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Creative component — Magnetic Button
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want important CTA buttons to 'pull' toward my cursor — interactive magnetic effect.
acceptanceCriteria: Component magnetic-button.tsx in components/creative/
Uses Motion useMotionValue + useSpring for smooth mouse tracking
Effect active only on hover (desktop)
Accepts children and inherits shadcn button styles
Returns smoothly to original position on hover exit (spring physics)
Respects prefers-reduced-motion
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Creative component — Marquee
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see a strip of technologies/tools scrolling infinitely — modern tech stack visual.
acceptanceCriteria: Component marquee.tsx in components/creative/
Infinite horizontal scroll using CSS @keyframes translateX (no JS)
Accepts items: string[] and speed as props
Duplicates items to create seamless loop
Pauses on hover (CSS animation-play-state: paused)
Respects prefers-reduced-motion (stays static)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Creative component — Animated Counter
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see numbers counting from 0 to the final value when the section enters the screen — demonstrates impact.
acceptanceCriteria: Component counter.tsx in components/creative/
Uses Motion useInView for trigger + animate for count-up
Props: target: number, suffix?: string (e.g. '+', '%'), duration?: number
Animates only once (first time entering viewport)
Respects prefers-reduced-motion (shows final value directly)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Creative component — Project Card with 3D tilt
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want project cards to have a subtle 3D effect on hover — highlights each project interactively.
acceptanceCriteria: Component project-card.tsx in components/creative/
Base: shadcn card with custom overlay
3D tilt effect via CSS perspective + rotateX/rotateY calculated from mouse position
Overlay with gradient that reveals title and tags on hover
Cover image with subtle parallax effect on hover
Typed props: project: Project (type defined in data/projects.ts)
Clickable — navigates to /projects/[slug]
Respects prefers-reduced-motion (no tilt, normal hover)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Section Wrapper with scroll reveal
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable wrapper that animates any section with fade-up when entering the viewport.
acceptanceCriteria: Component section-wrapper.tsx in components/layout/
Uses Motion whileInView with fadeIn + translateY(20px → 0)
Props: children, className, delay?: number
viewport: { once: true } — animates only the first time
Respects prefers-reduced-motion
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mock project data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need placeholder project data to build the pages.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/data/projects.ts with exported Project type
Type includes: slug, title, subtitle, description, longDescription, coverImage, images: string[], tags: string[], category, client, year, liveUrl?, githubUrl?, featured: boolean, results: string[]
5-6 mock projects with realistic data (fictional but plausible names)
2-3 projects marked as featured: true
Images referencing paths in /public/images/projects/ (placeholder — use placeholder.svg or similar)
Typecheck passes

Full viewport height (min-h-svh)
Large bold heading with text-reveal animation: impactful phrase about delivering results
Subtitle with short description
CTA using magnetic-button → link to /projects
gradient-blob in background (2-3 blobs with different colors)
cursor-spotlight active on entire section
Layout centered vertically and horizontally
Responsive — works well on mobile (no mouse-dependent effects)

userStories.title: Polish — Performance and Accessibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to ensure the site is performant and accessible despite heavy animations.
acceptanceCriteria: All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion (mediaQuery check)
Images use next/image with lazy loading
Heavy components (cursor-spotlight, magnetic-button) loaded with next/dynamic({ ssr: false })
Semantic HTML: hierarchical headings, landmarks (main, nav, footer)
Skip-to-content accessible link
Focus visible on all interactives
npm run build passes without errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.description: As a developer, I need the site to have good SEO and look good when shared on social media.
acceptanceCriteria: Global metadata in layout.tsx: title template, description, og:image default
Each page has generateMetadata or static metadata with unique title and description

robots.txt and sitemap.xml via Next.js App Router conventions
